reviews.review_description:
The physics in this game are off so hard, I'll aim at the ground and it will go to the sky
�

Im not sure if the developers are lying about the head tilting motion that supposedly aims the ball, or if they programmed it wrong, but the ball just goes wherever you look. Like, you literally just stare at the targets and the ball bounces right to them. It's laughably easy and boring, and there is no real skill involved. If instead the path of the ball was determined by how fast you "head-bump" and the angle of said motion, it would be fun. But here all you have to do is keep your head perfectly still while looking at the targets and the ball goes right to them. In fact, the only head motion you need to make is changing which target you're looking at.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback.we are not laying,fast rotate the head of the player can make the ball get faster velocity, the previous levels may be as long as you look at can pass, but many levels are need you kick out faster speed ball to get high scores and make three star.

reviews.review_description: A lot like headmaster on PSVR, but a bit easier to head the ball further. It's good fun!
Easily one of the best light weight games available in gear vr. Controls feel a bit awkward at the beginning, but once you get used to it, it is very addictive.
Not a bad gem its fun and responsive and for free you can not go wrong

Download this and happy Header

4 developer pls make another game like this... softbol tennis or golf... thank you
Pretty close to headmaster and free. It's harder though because of the tracking system to actually hit the ball properly but you'll find out how to beat it. Amazing that it is free. A must try.
It's an ok rip-off of headmaster for psvr, but the controls make it hard. Still ok though

reviews.review_title: Takes to long to load for me
reviews.review_description: It takes way to long to load but it’s fun
